name: 0neplan
description: The plan before the plan — a thought partner that finds the real goal before designing a build. USE WHEN /0nePlan, "0ne plan", "help me plan this build", "design a solution for", "plan out this app", "I have an idea I want to plan", "think through this build with me", "what's the best way to build", "architect this for me", OR before handing a build to plan mode / Algorithm mode. Runs a four-phase arc: extract the true goal, brainstorm solutions, match to what 0ne already owns, hand a designed plan to Build.
